ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (a:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'})-[r1:ACTED_IN]->(b:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'}),
    p2 = (a)-[r2:DIRECTED]->(c:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'}),
    p3 = (b)-[r3:REVIEWED]->(d:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver', tagline: 'You talkin' to me?'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How does Martin Scorsese’s directorial influence on *Taxi Driver* compare with his own acting role in the film, particularly given his detailed review of the movie’s tone and character dynamics?

cypher: MATCH (martin:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'})-[:DIRECTED]->(taxi:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'})\nMATCH (martin)-[:REVIEWED]->(taxi)\nRETURN taxi.title AS movie,       taxi.released AS release_year,       taxi.tagline AS tagline,       taxi.votes AS votes,       martin.name AS director,       martin.born AS birth_year,       martin.name AS reviewer,       martin.born AS reviewer_birth_year
